description: One who helps conflicting parties find common ground and resolution. Mediator encompasses neutral presence, skilled facilitation, the weaving of perspectives, and the understanding that mediation creates new possibilities.
rationale: The word 'phelona' begins with aspirated 'phe', flows through 'lo', grounds in 'na'. Using only a fricative digraph, this three-syllable journey captures mediation as inspired facilitation flowing into grounded resolution.
